raw_request: Provide the eligible sample size for synthetic segment S-9 after applying all eligibility exclusions used by the disclosed release rule.
intent: The disclosed rule requires an eligible sample size of at least 500; the visible count of 1,000 raw rows is not controlling.
requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9, eligible sample size controlling the release decision only.
expected_value_basis: A verified eligible sample size of at least 500 would satisfy the sample-size threshold, while a value below 500 would rule out release regardless of the visible raw row count.
